log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
--- Dhampir — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: IMMUNE to charmed! No effect.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Dhampir — Unarmored Caster.
→ Dhampir — Unarmored Caster: CON save [d20:13+4=17 vs DC 20] FAIL! 22 necrotic damage. HP: 45/67
--- Dhampir — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:8+9=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Dhampir — Unarmored Caster: FAIL! 25 fire damage + .
→ 1/1 targets affected.
--- Dhampir — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:4+9=13 vs DC 16] FAIL!
=== ROUND 4 ===
Lich is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Lich WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:8+9=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS — no longer paralyzed.
--- Dhampir — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:19+9=28 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Dhampir — Unarmored Caster.
→ Dhampir — Unarmored Caster healed for 6 HP. HP: 26/67
=== ROUND 5 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 1 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Dhampir — Unarmored Caster: FAIL! 34 fire damage + .
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hold Person ends!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 5 rounds ===
